description: Configuration for multi-issue interdependence analysis in /review-issue

overlap.description: Detect scope overlap between issues (shared files, components, or domains)
signals: Same file or module mentioned in description or proposed solution
Same directory or component area referenced

ordering.description: Detect ordering dependencies (issue A should precede issue B)
signals: Bug fix before enhancement to same component
Creation before deletion of related resources
One issue adds what another removes

sharedCriteria.description: Detect acceptance criteria that appear in multiple issues
signals: Similar or identical AC text across issues
AC referencing same test files or modules
